title: Create: Fantastic Weapons
body:
For MinecraftForge/NeoForge 1.20.1



 

**About:**

Create: Fantastic Weapons implements special weapons.

 

**Content:**

- Metal Bats: Available in 4 versions, give players the ability to toss a wide range of projectiles and launch them

- Street Lamp: Requires a light source to be attached to function. 13 options are available with different special attacks

- Boxing Gloves: Give player boxing ability. Available in 2 varients

- Propeller Lenggings: Propelles when jumpings, and reduce fall damage

- Big Syringe: The ability to give entity potion effects

- Super Fishing Rod: Super Fishing Rod
